steps.title: Map the clauses
steps.content: The sentence first says the vessel took six days to dislodge, with in part due to its sheer size explaining the reason. The words after the blank form another independent clause that explains what the sheer size means.

steps.title: Punctuate the explanation
steps.content: Choice A lacks the needed comma before the reason phrase and then uses a comma splice. Choice C also creates a comma splice, and Choice D leaves no punctuation before the next independent clause. A colon properly introduces the weight explanation. The answer is B.
